groups.name: FinTrack Support
groups.description: General support for FinTrack personal finance platform

users.name: FinTrack Support
users.details: FinTrack personal finance platform support agent

tickets.subject: Net worth calculation seems off
tickets.description: My net worth calculation doesn't seem right. I've been tracking manually and the total shown in FinTrack is different from what I calculated. Can you help me understand how it's calculated?

tickets.subject: Change email address
tickets.description: How do I update my email address on file? I can't find the option in settings.

tickets.subject: Investment tracking not working
tickets.description: My investment accounts aren't tracking properly. The values shown don't match what I see in my brokerage account. Can you help?

tickets.subject: Account connection lost
tickets.description: One of my bank accounts keeps disconnecting. Can you fix this connection issue?

tickets.subject: Budget alerts not working
tickets.description: I set up budget alerts but haven't received any notifications. Are they working correctly?

tickets.subject: How do I set up bill reminders?
tickets.description: How can I set up reminders for when bills are due? I don't see this feature in the app.

tickets.subject: Mobile app syncing issues
tickets.description: My mobile app isn't syncing with the web version. Transactions show up on web but not on my phone. Please help.

tickets.subject: Merchant name showing as gibberish
tickets.description: Some merchant names show up as random codes instead of the actual store name. Can these be cleaned up?

tickets.subject: Feature request: Split transactions
tickets.description: Is there a way to split a single transaction across multiple categories? Like when I buy groceries and household items in one trip?

tickets.subject: Transaction categorization error
tickets.description: Some of my transactions are being categorized incorrectly. Can I manually recategorize them?

tickets.subject: Password reset request
tickets.description: I forgot my password and the reset email isn't coming through. Can you resend it or reset it manually?

tickets.subject: Duplicate transaction showing
tickets.description: My dashboard numbers don't match when I manually calculate. Can you check?

tickets.subject: Recurring transactions not detected
tickets.description: I'm locked out of my account and need assistance getting back in.

tickets.subject: Mobile app syncing issues
tickets.description: My mobile app isn't syncing with the web version. Transactions show up on web but not on my phone. Please help.

tickets.subject: Can't access my account
tickets.description: I'm locked out of my account. Says my password is wrong but I'm sure it's correct. Help!

tickets.subject: Investment tracking not working
tickets.description: My investment accounts aren't tracking properly. The values shown don't match what I see in my brokerage account. Can you help?

tickets.subject: Merchant name showing as gibberish
tickets.description: Some merchant names show up as random codes instead of the actual store name. Can these be cleaned up?

tickets.subject: Can't access my account
tickets.description: I'm locked out of my account. Says my password is wrong but I'm sure it's correct. Help!

tickets.subject: Recurring transactions not detected
tickets.description: Is there a way to add custom spending categories?

tickets.subject: Budget alerts not working
tickets.description: I set up budget alerts but haven't received any notifications. Are they working correctly?

tickets.subject: Request for annual spending report
tickets.description: Can I get an annual spending report for 2025? I need it for tax purposes.

tickets.subject: Merchant name showing as gibberish
tickets.description: Some merchant names show up as random codes instead of the actual store name. Can these be cleaned up?

tickets.subject: Budget alerts not working
tickets.description: I set up budget alerts but haven't received any notifications. Are they working correctly?

tickets.subject: Password reset request
tickets.description: I forgot my password and the reset email isn't coming through. Can you resend it or reset it manually?

tickets.subject: Net worth calculation seems off
tickets.description: My net worth calculation doesn't seem right. I've been tracking manually and the total shown in FinTrack is different from what I calculated. Can you help me understand how it's calculated?

tickets.subject: Mobile app syncing issues
tickets.description: My mobile app isn't syncing with the web version. Transactions show up on web but not on my phone. Please help.

tickets.subject: Budget alerts not working
tickets.description: I set up budget alerts but haven't received any notifications. Are they working correctly?

tickets.subject: Request for annual spending report
tickets.description: Can I get an annual spending report for 2025? I need it for tax purposes.

tickets.subject: Password reset request
tickets.description: I forgot my password and the reset email isn't coming through. Can you resend it or reset it manually?

tickets.subject: Can't access my account
tickets.description: I'm locked out of my account. Says my password is wrong but I'm sure it's correct. Help!

tickets.subject: How to export transaction data to CSV?
tickets.description: I need to export all my 2025 transactions to CSV for my accountant. Where's the export button? I can't find it in the transactions tab.

tickets.subject: Enable two-factor authentication
tickets.description: I want to enable 2FA for my account for extra security. How do I set this up? I don't see it in account settings.

tickets.subject: Spending insights report not generating
tickets.description: When I try to generate my monthly spending insights report, I get an error message. Can you help me get this working? I need to see my spending breakdown by category.

tickets.subject: Can't link my Chase Sapphire card
tickets.description: I'm trying to add my Chase Sapphire Reserve credit card but keep getting 'Connection Failed' error. I've tried three times. Can you help me link this account?

tickets.subject: Request to delete my account
tickets.description: I want to permanently delete my FinTrack account and all associated data. What's the process for this? Do I need to unlink all accounts first?

tickets.subject: Recurring transaction tracking
tickets.description: Is there a way to track recurring transactions separately? I want to see all my monthly subscriptions and bills in one view. Does FinTrack have this feature?

tickets.subject: Turn off email notifications
tickets.description: I'm getting too many email notifications about every single transaction. Can I turn these off or limit them to just large transactions over $100?

tickets.subject: Add tags to transactions
tickets.description: Can I add custom tags to transactions? I want to tag business expenses separately from personal ones for tax purposes.

tickets.subject: Savings goal tracking feature?
tickets.description: Does FinTrack have a savings goal feature? I'm trying to save $10,000 for a vacation and want to track progress. If not, is this planned?

tickets.subject: Transaction missing from feed
tickets.description: I made a payment to my credit card yesterday but it's not showing up in my transaction feed. Should I wait longer or is something wrong?

tickets.subject: Connect Venmo account
tickets.description: Can I link my Venmo account to FinTrack? I don't see it in the list of supported institutions. I have a lot of transactions there I want to track.

tickets.subject: Spending comparison: this year vs last year
tickets.description: I'd love to see a comparison of my spending this year versus last year. Is there a report or dashboard that shows year-over-year trends?

tickets.subject: Cash transaction entry
tickets.description: How do I manually add cash transactions? I withdrew $200 from ATM and spent cash but it's not being tracked. Can I enter these manually?

tickets.subject: Merchant logo incorrect
tickets.description: The logo for Starbucks is showing up as a generic coffee cup instead of the actual Starbucks logo. Minor issue but thought you should know!

tickets.subject: Shared account with spouse
tickets.description: My spouse and I want to share access to track our joint checking account. Can we both link the same account to our separate FinTrack profiles?
